AssociatedWith: It is associated with the Kayı tribe.
BelongsTo: It belongs to the Oghuz Turks.

KnownFor: It is known for ruling the Ottoman Empire.
NamedAfter: It is named after Osman I.
OccurredDuring: It occurred during the Turkish War of Independence.
OccurredIn: It occurred in the Ottoman Empire.
